S.FORM: = Qaboos bin Said al Said = Mntucing hngkawas 1940 idas 11 jiyax 18 ka Qaboos bin Said al Said ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Oman ta sayang o kiya ka Qaboos bin Said al Said, pnaah hngkawas 1970 idas 7 jiyax 23 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = qaboos bin said al said = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka qaboos bin said al said ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan oman ta sajaŋ o kija ka qaboos bin said al said, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Qaboos bin Said al Said = Mntucing hngkawas 1940 idas 11 jiyax 18 ka Qaboos bin Said al Said ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Oman ta sayang o kiya ka Qaboos bin Said al Said, pnaah hngkawas 1970 idas 7 jiyax 23 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = qaboos bin said al said = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka qaboos bin said al said ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan oman ta sajaŋ o kija ka qaboos bin said al said, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
